'''dhadacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enamourment|enamourment]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-d-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enamourment|enamourment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhadacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhædæchæth|dhædæchæth]] || [[word:dhædæchæj|dhædæchæj]] || [[word:dhædæchæsh|dhædæchæsh]] || [[word:dhædæchæ|dhædæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhadadachath|dhadadachath]] || [[word:dhadadachaj|dhadadachaj]] || [[word:dhadadachash|dhadadachash]] || [[word:dhadadacha|dhadadacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhadachath|dhadachath]] || [[word:dhadachaj|dhadachaj]] || [[word:dhadachash|dhadachash]] || [[word:dhadacha|dhadacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhadafchath|dhadafchath]] || [[word:dhadafchaj|dhadafchaj]] || [[word:dhadafchash|dhadafchash]] || [[word:dhadafchaf|dhadafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhadachatha|dhadachatha]] || [[word:dhadachaja|dhadachaja]] || [[word:dhadachasha|dhadachasha]] || [[word:dhadachaka|dhadachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhadachath|dhadachath]] || [[word:dhadachaj|dhadachaj]] || [[word:dhadachash|dhadachash]] || [[word:dhadacha|dhadacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhadachathal|dhadachathal]] || [[word:dhadachajal|dhadachajal]] || [[word:dhadachashal|dhadachashal]] || [[word:dhadachakal|dhadachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhadachathatha|dhadachathatha]] || [[word:dhadachajaja|dhadachajaja]] || [[word:dhadachashasha|dhadachashasha]] || [[word:dhadachaka|dhadachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhadachathan|dhadachathan]] || [[word:dhadachajan|dhadachajan]] || [[word:dhadachashan|dhadachashan]] || [[word:dhadachakan|dhadachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhadachathaoro|dhadachathaoro]] || [[word:dhadachajaoro|dhadachajaoro]] || [[word:dhadachashaoro|dhadachashaoro]] || [[word:dhadachakaoro|dhadachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
